  <script>
   function logTimings() {
    if (window.appStorage) {
        var url = 'https://' + window.appStorage.statsHost + '/stat/radar?data=';
        var prefix = ['performance.env', window.appStorage.env, window.appStorage.platform, window.appStorage.pageId].join('.');
        if (performance.getEntriesByType('navigation').length) {
            try {
                var imageNode = new Image();
                imageNode.src = url + JSON.stringify({p: prefix, t: { responseStart: performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0].responseStart}});
            } catch (e) { /* empty */ }
        }

        if (PerformanceObserver && (PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || []).includes('paint')) {
            var observer = new PerformanceObserver(function (list) {
                list.getEntries().forEach(function (entry) {
                    if (entry.name === 'first-contentful-paint') {
                        try {
                            var imageNode = new Image();
                            imageNode.src = url + JSON.stringify({p: prefix, t: {firstContentfulPaint: entry.startTime}});
                        } catch (e) { /* empty */ }
                        observer.disconnect();
                    }
                });
            });
            observer.observe({ type: 'paint', buffered: true });
        }
    }
}

try {
    logTimings();

    if ('PerformanceLongTaskTiming' in window) {
        var globalStats = window.__statsLongTasks = { tasks: [] };
        globalStats.observer = new PerformanceObserver(function(list) {
            globalStats.tasks = globalStats.tasks.concat(list.getEntries());
        });
        globalStats.observer.observe({ entryTypes: ['longtask'] });
    }

    var trackImageLoad = function (status) {
        return function (e) {
            var el = e.target;
            var src = el.currentSrc || el.src;
            if (el.tagName === 'IMG' && src && src.match(/https?:\/\/(((.+)\.)?k\.avito\.ru)|(www\.avito\.st)|(\d+\.img\.avito\.st)/)) {
                var detail = { image_url: src, image_status: status };
                if (window.__statsImages) {
                    window.__statsImages.push(detail);
                } else {
                    // Отправляем в @avito/stats события загрузки или ошибки во время загрузки картинок
                    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('@avito/stats:imageload', { detail: detail }));
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if ('PerformanceResourceTiming' in window) {
        // Здесь будем сохранять информацию о загрузках картинок, произошедших до инициализации @avito/stats
        window.__statsImages = [];
        document.addEventListener('load', trackImageLoad(true), true);
        document.addEventListener('error', trackImageLoad(false), true);
    }

    if ((typeof PerformanceObserver !== 'undefined') && PerformanceObserver
    && (PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || []).some(function(e) {
        return e === 'element'
    })) {
        if (!window.oet) {
            window.oet = [];
        }

        new PerformanceObserver(function(l) {
            window.oet.push.apply(window.oet, l.getEntries());
        }).observe({ entryTypes: ['element'] });
    }
} catch (e) {
    console.error(e);
}
  </script>
  <script>
   (function(global) {
    function warning() {
        return;
    }

    var RENDER_START = 'render:start';
    var RENDER_END = 'render:end';

    var store = {};
    var eventSubscribers = [];
    var metricSubscribers = [];
    var navigationStart = null;

    function notifySubscribers(key, event, subscribers) {
        subscribers.forEach(function(callback) {
            try {
                callback(key, event);
            } catch (e) {
                warning(key, event?.type, 'Error occured while notifying.')
            }
        });
    }

    function onEvent(callback) {
        eventSubscribers.push(callback);
        return () => {
            var i = eventSubscribers.indexOf(callback);
            if (i !== -1) {
                eventSubscribers.splice(i, 1);
            }
        };
    }

    function onMetric(callback) {
        metricSubscribers.push(callback);
        return () => {
            var i = metricSubscribers.indexOf(callback);
            if (i !== -1) {
                metricSubscribers.splice(i, 1);
            }
        };
    }

    function notify(key, event) {
        if (event.metric) {
            notifySubscribers(key, event, metricSubscribers);
        }
        notifySubscribers(key, event, eventSubscribers);
    }

    function set(key, value, eventType) {
        var lastEvent = getLastEvent(key);
        var event = {
            value: value,
            type: eventType,
            markName: '',
            metric: undefined
        };

        // Initial lifecycle: only render:end is valid (0 → value)
        if (!lastEvent) {
            if (eventType !== RENDER_END) {
                warning(key, eventType, 'Initial event must be render:end.');
                return;
            }

            var start;
            if (navigationStart !== null && typeof navigationStart === 'number') {
                start = navigationStart;
            } else {
                start = 0;
            }

            store[key] = [event];
            event.markName = `${key}:${RENDER_END}:0`;
            event.metric = {
                value: value - start,
                start: start,
                end: value,
                metricType: 'initial',
                measureName: `${key}:render:0`
            };
            notify(key, event);
            return;
        }

        // Block repeats
        if (eventType === lastEvent.type) {
            warning(key, eventType, 'Previous event has the same type; possible bug.');
            return;
        }

        // Re-render transitions
        var isStartAfterEnd = lastEvent.type === RENDER_END && eventType === RENDER_START;
        var isEndAfterStart = lastEvent.type === RENDER_START && eventType === RENDER_END;
        var renderIndex = Math.floor((store[key].length - 1) / 2) + 1;

        if (isStartAfterEnd) {
            event.markName = `${key}:${RENDER_START}:${renderIndex}`;
            store[key].push(event);
            notify(key, event);
            return;
        }

        if (isEndAfterStart) {
            event.markName = `${key}:${RENDER_END}:${renderIndex}`;
            event.metric = {
                value: value - lastEvent.value,
                start: lastEvent.value,
                end: value,
                metricType: 'spa',
                measureName: `${key}:render:${renderIndex}`
            };
            store[key].push(event);
            notify(key, event);
            return;
        }

        warning(key, eventType, 'Unhandled transition.');
    }

    function get(key) {
        if (!store.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
            return undefined
        }

        return store[key];
    }

    function getLastEvent(key) {
        if (store.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
            return store[key][store[key].length - 1];
        }

        return undefined;
    }

    function getAll() {
        return { ...store };
    }

    function setNavigationStart(ts) {
        navigationStart = ts;
    }

    global.PerformanceStore = {
        set: set,
        get: get,
        getAll: getAll,
        setNavigationStart: setNavigationStart,
        onEvent,
        onMetric
    };
})(window);

window.trackElementsVisibility = true;

window.reportVisibility = function(id, type) {
    if (!type) {
        type = 'render:end';
    }

    var now = (typeof performance !== 'undefined' && performance.now) ? performance.now() : Date.now();
    window.PerformanceStore.set(id, now, type);
}

window.trackVisibilityWithIO = function(id, marker) {
    try {
        if (!window.PerformanceStore.get(id)) {
            var domNode;
            if (marker) {
                domNode = document.querySelector(`[data-marker="${marker}"]`);
            } else {
                domNode = document.getElementById(id);
            }
            if (!domNode) {
                return;
            }

            var o = new IntersectionObserver(function(_, observer) {
                if (domNode.dataset.throttled) {
                    var mo = new MutationObserver(function(_, moInstance) {
                        window.reportVisibility(id, 'render:end');
                        moInstance.disconnect();
                    })
                    mo.observe(domNode, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['style'] });
                } else {
                    window.reportVisibility(id, 'render:end');
                }
                observer.unobserve(domNode);
                observer.disconnect();
            });
            o.observe(domNode);
        }
    } catch (e) {
        // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
        console.warn('@avito/render-measurements: Error occured during trackVisibilityWithIO.');
    }
}

window.PerformanceStore.onEvent((_, event) => {
    if (performance && performance.mark) {
        performance.mark(event.markName, { startTime: event.value });
    }
})

window.PerformanceStore.onMetric((_, event) => {
    if (performance && performance.measure) {
        performance.measure(
            event.metric.measureName,
            { start: event.metric.start, end: event.metric.end }
        );
    }
})
  </script>

  <script>
   window.addEventListener("error", function (e) {
  var eleArray = ["IMG", "SCRIPT", "LINK"];

  var ele = e.target;
  var tagName = ele.tagName;
  if (~eleArray.indexOf(tagName)) {
    var chunk = ele.dataset.chunk;
    var metric = 'frontend.new-desktop.env.' + 'prod' + '.degradation.' + tagName;
    metric += chunk ? '.' + chunk : '';
    var count = {};
    var request = {
      p: ''
    }
    count[metric] = 1;
    request.c = count;
    try {
      var imageNode = new Image();
      imageNode.src = 'https://stats.avito.ru/stat/radar?data=' + JSON.stringify(request);
    } catch (e) {
    }
  }
}, true);
  </script>
  <script>
   var delayGtm = 'true';
var gtmId = null;(function (w, d, s, l, ids, delayGtm) {
    function init(i) {
        w[l] = w[l] || [];
        w[l].push({
            'gtm.start': new Date().getTime(),
            event: 'gtm.js'
        });
        var f = d.getElementsByTagName(s)[0];
        var j = d.createElement(s);
        var dl = l != 'dataLayer' ? '&l=' + l : '';
        j.async = true;
        j.src = 'https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtm.js?id=' + i + dl;
        f.parentNode.insertBefore(j, f);
    }

    for (var k = 0; k < ids.length; k++) {
        if (!ids[k]) continue;
        if (delayGtm === 'true') {
            setTimeout(init.bind(null, ids[k]), 100);
        } else {
            init(ids[k]);
        }
    }
    // eslint-disable-next-line no-undef
})(window, document, 'script', 'dataLayer', [gtmId, 'GTM-NXSR9TPW', 'GTM-WXSMTMS2'], delayGtm);
  </script>

   <script>
    var delayedScriptsJSON= '[{"src":"https://www.avito.st/dstatic/j/mon-check.js","async":true}]';function addDelayedScripts() {
    // eslint-disable-next-line no-undef
    var delayedScripts = JSON.parse(delayedScriptsJSON);
    delayedScripts.forEach(function(delayedScript) {
        var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');

        Object.keys(delayedScript).forEach(function(tagName) {
            scriptElement.setAttribute(tagName, delayedScript[tagName]);
        });

        document.head.appendChild(scriptElement);
    });
}

try {
    window.addEventListener('load', function() {
        setTimeout(function() {
            function interactiveTimeHandler() {
                clearTimeout(timerId);
                addDelayedScripts();
            }

            var timerId = setTimeout(function() {
                window.removeEventListener('interactivetime', interactiveTimeHandler);
                addDelayedScripts();
            }, 20 * 1000);

            window.addEventListener('interactivetime', interactiveTimeHandler);
        }, 0);
    });
} catch (e) {
    console.error(e);
}
   </script>
